data: Classic Beef Bolognese: Brown 1 lb ground beef and 1/2 lb ground pork with 1 finely chopped onion, 2 carrots, and 2 celery stalks. Pour in 1/2 cup dry white wine and simmer until evaporated. Add one 28oz can of crushed tomatoes, 2 tbsp tomato paste, and 1 cup whole milk. Simmer on low heat for 2 hours, stirring occasionally. Serve over fresh tagliatelle noodles.
